use_cases: Collect email addresses for product launch waitlists with celebratory feedback
Early access signup forms for SaaS applications awaiting full release
Pre-launch interest capture with animated confirmation states
ai_summary: A minimalist waitlist signup form with gradient text styling and blur-to-focus entrance animations. Features confetti celebration on successful submission and smooth AnimatePresence transitions between form and thank-you states. Designed for product launches and early access campaigns across SaaS and creator platforms.
